Uses of Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotElement

  • Uses of PotElement in cc.quaternion.potshaper

    Subclasses of PotElement in cc.quaternion.potshaper
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PotAudio
    Represents an audio element embedded within a presentation slide.
    class 
    PotChart
    Represents a chart element within a PowerPoint slide.
    class 
    PotConnector
    Represents a connector shape that can be drawn between points or shapes on a slide.
    class 
    PotGroup
    Represents a group of shapes and other elements within a PowerPoint slide.
    class 
    PotImage
    Represents an image element within a PowerPoint slide.
    class 
    PotShape
    Represents a shape element within a PowerPoint slide.
    class 
    PotTable
    Represents a table element within a presentation slide.
    class 
    PotTextBox
    Represents a text box shape within a PowerPoint slide, providing a fluent API for text and style manipulation.
    class 
    PotUnknownElement
    Represents a PowerPoint slide element whose specific type is not recognized by the PotShaper library.
    class 
    PotVideo
    Represents a video element within a presentation slide.
    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper with type parameters of type PotElement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.action(PotAction action)
    Attaches an action (e.g., mouseclick or mouseover) to the element.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.animate(PotAnimation animation)
    Applies an animation to this element.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.at(double x, double y)
    Sets the position of the element to the specified coordinates.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.bevel(Pot3DFormat.Bevel bevel)
    Applies a bevel effect to the element.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.bringForward()
    Brings this element one step forward in the slide's drawing order.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.bringToFront()
    Brings this element to the front of the slide's drawing order.
    <T extends PotElement>
    List<T>
    PotSlide.findElementsByType(Class<T> type)
    Returns an unmodifiable list of elements filtered by a specific type.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.flipHorizontal()
    Toggles the horizontal flip state of the element.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.flipVertical()
    Toggles the vertical flip state of the element.
    <T extends PotElement>
    PotGroup
    PotGroup.forEach(Class<T> type, Consumer<T> action)
    Performs the given action for each element of a specific type in this group.
    <T extends PotElement>
    List<T>
    PotGroup.getElements(Class<T> type)
    Returns a filtered list of elements of a specific type contained in this group.

    List<T>
    PotSlide.getElements(Class<T> type)
    Returns an unmodifiable list of elements filtered by a specific type.

    T
    PotElement.glow(PotEffect.Glow glow)
    Applies a glow effect to the element.

    T

    Sets the height of the element (fluent builder alias).

    T

    Attaches a hyperlink defined by a PotHyperlink object.

    T
    PotElement.hyperlink(String url)
    Attaches a hyperlink to this element that points to an external URL.

    T
    PotElement.hyperlinkToSlide(int slideIndex)
    Creates a hyperlink that jumps to a specific slide within the same presentation.

    T

    Applies a lighting effect to the element.

    T
    PotElement.material(Pot3DFormat.Material material)
    Applies a material effect to the element.

    T
    PotElement.move(double dx, double dy)
    Moves the element by the specified offsets.

    T
    PotGroup.move(double dx, double dy)
    Moves this group by the specified offsets.

    T
    PotElement.opacity(double alpha)
    Sets the opacity (transparency) of the element.

    T
    PotElement.position(double x, double y)
    Sets the position of the element (fluent builder alias for at(double, double)).

    T
    PotElement.reflection(PotEffect.Reflection reflection)
    Applies a reflection effect to the element.

    T

    Removes an action from the element.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.removeAnimation()
    Removes any animation attached to this element.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.removeEffects()
    Removes all visual effects (shadow, reflection, glow, softedge, 3D) from the element.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.removeHyperlink()
    Removes any hyperlink attached to this element.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.removeShadow()
    Removes any shadow effect from the element.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.rotate(double angle)
    Sets the rotation angle of the element.

    T
    PotElement.rotateBy(double deltaAngle)
    Rotates the element by the specified angle delta.

    T
    PotElement.rotation(double angle)
    Sets the rotation angle of the element (fluent builder alias).

    T
    PotElement.rotation3D(Pot3DFormat.Rotation rotation)
    Applies a 3D rotation effect to the element.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.scale(double scale)
    Scales the element uniformly by the specified factor.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.scale(double scaleX, double scaleY)
    Scales the element independently along the X and Y axes.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotGroup.scale(double scale)
    Scales this group uniformly by the specified factor.
    <T extends PotElement>
    T
    PotElement.sendBackward()
    Sends this element one step backward in the slide's drawing order.

    T
    PotElement.sendToBack()
    Sends this element to the back of the slide's drawing order.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotElement
    PotElement.duplicate()
    Creates a copy of this element on the same slide.
    PotElement
    PotUnknownElement.duplicate()
    Duplication is not supported for unknown element types.
    PotElement

    Finds a presentation element by its unique identifier.
    PotElement

    Returns the element at the specified position in this group.
    PotElement

    Returns the element with the specified UUID, or null if not found.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<PotElement>
    PotSlide.findElements(Predicate<PotElement> predicate)
    Returns an unmodifiable list of elements that satisfy a given predicate.
    List<PotElement>
    PotSlide.findElementsByName(String name)
    Returns an unmodifiable list of elements that have a specific name.
    List<PotElement>
    PotGroup.getElements()
    Returns an unmodifiable list of all elements contained in this group.
    List<PotElement>
    PotSlide.getElements()
    Returns an unmodifiable list of all elements on this slide.
    List<PotElement>
    PotGroup.ungroup()
    Ungroups this group, releasing all contained elements back to the parent slide.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotGroup
    PotGroup.add(PotElement element)
    Adds an element to this group.
    PotConnector
    PotSlide.addConnector(PotElement from, PotElement to)
    Adds a new straight connector between two elements.
    PotConnector
    PotConnector.connectFrom(PotElement element)
    Connects the start of this connector to another shape element.
    PotConnector
    PotConnector.connectTo(PotElement element)
    Connects the end of this connector to another shape element.
    String
    PotXml.getShapeXml(PotElement element)
    Returns the XML representation of the specified shape element.
    boolean
    PotXml.patchShape(PotElement element, String xpath, String value)
    Patches a shape's XML by setting the value of nodes matching an XPath expression.
    PotGroup
    PotGroup.remove(PotElement element)
    Removes an element from this group.
    boolean
    PotXml.replaceShapeXml(PotElement element, String xmlContent)
    Replaces the entire XML content of a shape with a new XML fragment.

    Modifier and Type

    Description
